title: Turtle Body
description: This mod adds the rest of the turtle set.
body:
# Turtle Body
This mod adds the rest of the turtle set, and when you have the complete set equipped, you gain the Dolphin's Grace effect.

![turtlebody_01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dda497adb99679d7ee5c486be7b624bbe465b938.png)

![turtlebody_02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b2f634f21f523315e1f1e529c729fa32bf07228.png)

![turtlebody_03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6828afed114097c4094fa0e1f518c97306ab1d40.png)

![turtlebody_04](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d98e3012c666d182abe2895831833e31ff6f825.png)

## Turtle Body

![turtlebody_craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9734b1d2c4af08e0121dc401118cc805b242bf9b.png)

## Turtle Leggings

![turtlelegg_craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7869259853ee1b8cf9a4f1082f48501df3afb58e.png)

## Turtle Boots

![turtleboots_craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2755e37c2c44ee12a6b681e1f2c1326024d5c6c3.png)

### Dependencies:     
Fabricloader: ">=0.15.3" 

Fabric-api [https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

Geckolib: 1.20.2 - v4.3.1 [https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/4.3.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/4.3.1)
